title: You Can Now Watch a Ton of My Hero Academia Episodes for Free Ahead of Anime’s Real Finale
content: There’s now an easy way to catch up with My Hero Academia as you can watch a ton of episodes completely for free as part of a huge marathon. My Hero Academia ended its TV anime run last year with its eighth and final season , but the franchise still has a lot planned for 2026 as it has kicked off the tenth anniversary…
author: ComicBook

title: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 Casts Mai Nakahara
content: The staff for the second television anime season based on Fujino Ōmori and Toshi Aoi 's Wistoria: Wand and Sword ( Tsue to Tsurugi no Wistoria ) manga announced on Sunday that Mai Nakahara is joining the anime's cast as the high mage Clairie Serah.
author: ANN

title: Shonen Jump Officially Cancels Yet Another Major Series in 2026 (& Fans Saw It Coming)
content: Shueisha’s Weekly Shonen Jump magazine has officially cancelled its fourth major series of the year, and unfortunately fans saw this one coming. With the start of a new quarter comes the start of a new phase for the long running magazine.
author: ComicBook

title: All Pokémon Centers in Japan Cancel Most Events in April
content: The cancellations apply to the Pokémon Centers in Sapporo, Tohoku, Tokyo DX, Shibuya, Skytree Town, Tokyo Bay, Yokohama, Nagoya, Kanazawa, Kyoto, Osaka, Osaka DX, Hiroshima, Kagawa, Fukuoka, and Okinawa.
author: ANN

title: The Promised Neverland Manga Gets Stage Musical This Winter
content: The musical will commemorate the franchise 's 10th anniversary. The theater group will host full auditions for the roles of Emma, Norman, and Ray. Shirai and Demizu launched the manga in Shueisha 's Weekly Shonen Jump magazine in August 2016, and the series ended in June 2020.
author: ANN

title: Fullmetal Alchemist Replacement Confirms Episode Count After April Debut
content: The mind behind one of the greatest anime and manga stories of all time, Fullmetal Alchemist , has returned with a new anime airing this April, and has confirmed how long it’s going to be sticking around for.
author: ComicBook

title: The Detective Is Already Dead Anime Unveils Season 2's 1st Video, Switch Game
content: Kadokawa presented the first promotional video and first key visual for the second television anime season based on Nigojū and Umibōzu 's The Detective Is Already Dead ( Tantei wa Mō, Shindeiru. ) light novel series, on Sunday.
author: ANN

title: The Detective Is Already Dead Season 2 Unveils First Key Visual, Trailer
content: The upcoming The Detective Is Already Dead Season 2 anime unveiled its first key visual and trailer on Sunday. The sequel was originally set to premiere this July but was delayed to October due to production circumstances. Studio ENGI returns to animate the sequel with Manabu Kurihara as director.
author: Anime Corner

title: 7 Best Anime Series of Winter 2026, Ranked
content: As the second week of Spring 2026 approaches, every anime that aired in Winter 2026 has finally come to an end, and it has been one of the best seasons in anime. This lineup alone makes it one of the strongest seasons in years, offering everything from slice-of-life and political drama to heavy action series.
author: ComicBook
